name: llm-commit
description: Generate Git commit messages using local or cloud LLMs — supports Apple Foundation Models, LM Studio, Ollama, and OpenAI.

enumDescriptions: Apple Foundation Models — on-device, no setup required (macOS 26+, Apple Silicon)
Custom configuration using manual URL and API key
llm-commit.provider.description: Select a provider preset or use custom configuration.

llm-commit.apiUrl.description: URL of the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.

llm-commit.apiKey.description: API key for the OpenAI-compatible API (if required).

llm-commit.prompt.default:
Generate a git commit message following the Conventional Commits specification for the changes below.

**Format:** <type>(<optional scope>): <description>

**Types:**
- feat: A new feature
- fix: A bug fix
- docs: Documentation changes
- style: Code style changes (formatting, whitespace, no logic change)
- refactor: Code restructuring without changing behavior
- perf: Performance improvements
- test: Adding or updating tests
- build: Build system or dependency changes
- ci: CI/CD configuration changes
- chore: Routine tasks, maintenance

**Rules:**
- Use imperative, present tense (e.g., "add" not "added")
- Keep the description under 50 characters
- Lowercase the description (no capital start, no period)
- Add scope in parentheses if applicable (e.g., `feat(auth):`)
- For breaking changes, add `!` before colon (e.g., `feat!:`)

**Diff:**
```diff
{diff}
```

**Commit message:**
llm-commit.prompt.description: Prompt template for the LLM. Use '{diff}' as placeholder for the git diff.

llm-commit.maxDiffLength.description: Maximum length of the git diff (in characters) to send to the LLM. Prevents overly long requests.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:swift && npm run package
scripts.build:swift: cd swift/fm-cli && swift build -c release && mkdir -p ../../bin && cp $(swift build -c release --show-bin-path)/fm-cli ../../bin/fm-cli
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
